data.content: Implementation review approved. Confirmed /api/beats/stale-grooming/status returns queue, worker, active job, failure, completion, and review data; Diagnostics Runtime includes the Stale Grooming Worker card; tests include stale-beat-grooming-status-route coverage; default tests remain hermetic. Sanity gates passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
